scope: Tool-call begin/end correlation in TUI message adapter — no UUID drift on missing callId

requiredBehaviors: When event type is tool_call_started, mcp_tool_call_begin, or exec_command_begin and payload.callId is not a string, the branch must NOT call randomUUID and must NOT push a tool-use message; it must return early like the tool_progress branch does.
When payload.callId is a string, behavior is unchanged: pushToolUse runs with the provided callId and runningToolNames stores the resolved toolName.
Implementation must mirror the existing fail-closed precedent at the tool_progress branch (early return on missing callId) so begin/end correlation is preserved end-to-end.

When event type is tool_call_completed, mcp_tool_call_end, or exec_command_end and payload.callId is not a string, the branch must NOT call randomUUID and must NOT push a tool-result message; it must return early.
When payload.callId is a string, behavior is unchanged: pushToolResult runs with the provided callId, runningToolNames.delete(callId) and runningToolProgress.delete(callId) still execute.
A begin/end pair that arrives without callId must produce zero messages (no orphan tool-use card and no detached tool-result), and openTools must remain empty.
When event type is collab_agent_spawn_begin and payload.callId is not a string, the branch must NOT call randomUUID and must NOT push a Task tool-use message; it must return early.
When payload.callId is a string, behavior is unchanged: pushToolUse runs with the provided callId and the Task input includes description/prompt/subagent_type/model derived from the payload.

When event type is collab_agent_spawn_end, collab_agent_interaction_end, collab_waiting_end, collab_close_end, or collab_resume_end and payload.callId is not a string, the branch must NOT call randomUUID and must NOT push a tool-result message; it must return early.
When payload.callId is a string, behavior is unchanged: pushToolResult runs with the provided callId and the formatted agent status.
A collab_agent_spawn_begin / collab_agent_spawn_end pair that arrives without callId must produce zero messages and leave openTools empty.
